name: Salmon
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Fettucine, cooked following package instructions
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the salmon and rinse it in cold water. Carefully remove any bones.
2. Flake the salmon coarsely and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, sauté the green onion in oil, stirring often.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together cornstarch and 2 tablespoons of chicken broth until smooth.
5. Whisk in mustard and remaining broth, mixing thoroughly.
6. Pour the mixture into the skillet with the green onions, stirring constantly until it thickens.
7. Add heavy cream, dill, lemon juice, and salmon to the skillet. Heat just to serving temperature.
8. In a serving bowl, pour the sauce over the warm fettucine and toss gently. Serve immediately.
